Argument Reference

The following arguments are supported:

  • configuration - (Optional) (Updatable) The managed instance configuration.
  • compartment_id - (Optional) Updating this field after creation is not supported.
  • display_name - (Optional) Updating this field after creation is not supported.
  • id - (Optional) Updating this field after creation is not supported.
  • plugin_status - (Optional) Updating this field after creation is not supported.
